title: Tether Investment Values Whop at $1.6 Billion as Stablecoins Go Mainstream
message_html: Tether Investment Values Whop at $1.6 Billion as Stablecoins Go Mainstream ...
snippet: Tether Investments said it aims to promote the use of stablecoin payments by making a strategic investment in Whop, an internet market designed to help users launch businesses and accept payments. The companies’ collaboration will enable the creators and users on Whop’s platform to use Tether’s USDT

title: Stripe Wants to Reinvent Global Settlement With Its Tempo Blockchain
message_html: Stripe Wants to Reinvent Global Settlement With Its Tempo Blockchain ...
snippet: FinTech Stripe has spent much of its operational history making it easier for merchants to plug into the financial system. Now, it is trying to redesign the system itself. According to the company’s 2025 annual letter, which was published Tuesday (Feb. 24) and devoted a good chunk to blockchain and
